narrative_beat: Robo carmesim dourado em primeiro plano com fabrica P&B ao fundo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid humanoid robot in crimson gold and dark metal armor with glowing red eyes standing upright in foreground
subject.focal_point: the glowing red eyes of the robot
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated industrial factory with smoking chimneys and urban skyline in background, chiaroscuro dramatic lighting
props: humanoid robot in crimson gold armor

style.post_processing: 35mm film grain, anamorphic lens flares, halation

symbolism.primary: the image of the beast given life — Revelation 13:15
symbolism.secondary: robot as modern fulfillment of ancient prophecy

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only
